title: tp-run-full-design tier return (base)
description: Base envelope a dispatched tier subagent synthesizes and returns to the orchestrator. Generator/audit tier schemas extend this via allOf+$ref (the $id is a urn: so cross-file refs resolve by exact match rather than relative-URI mangling; the instance `schema` field keeps the slash-style logical name to match candidate.v1). The orchestrator branches on `status`; budget accounting uses the harness `subagent_tokens` from Agent return metadata, NOT `telemetry.tokens_used` (advisory/nullable, self-report undercounts ~50% per spike F4).
